---
title: "Intent-Aware Recommendation System"
description: "End-to-end machine learning system combining product classification, search intent modeling, and recommendation."
---

## Overview

This project implements an end-to-end machine learning system for intent-aware product recommendation using real e-commerce interaction data.

The system combines three core components:

- **Product Classification**: supervised learning model to predict product categories.
- **Search Intent Modeling**: unsupervised or weakly supervised inference of user intent from search queries.
- **Recommendation System**: ranking-based model to retrieve relevant products.

The final objective is to transform a raw search query into structured predictions and personalized recommendations.

---

## Problem Statement

Given a user search query, the system must:

1. Predict the most likely product category.
2. Infer the user's search intent.
3. Recommend the top 10 most relevant products.

---

## Methodology

The project follows a structured machine learning pipeline:

- Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
- Feature engineering (text + structured data)
- Supervised learning (classification)
- Unsupervised learning (intent modeling)
- Ranking / recommendation system
- System integration
- Evaluation

---

## Dataset

The dataset consists of user search interactions on an e-commerce platform, including:

- Search queries
- Product metadata (title, tags, price, etc.)
- Click behavior
- Product categories

See the full challenge specification for details.

---

## Project Structure

The repository is organized as follows:

```text
intent-aware-recommendation-system/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ raw/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ elo7_recruitment_dataset.csv
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ interim/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ processed/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ external/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docs/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ elo7-ds-challenge-pt.md
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ elo7-ds-challenge-en.md
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ notebooks/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 01_exploratory_data_analysis.ipynb
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 02_product_classification.ipynb
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 03_search_intent_modeling.ipynb
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 04_recommendation_engine.ipynb
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 05_system_integration.ipynb
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ 06_evaluation.ipynb
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ reports/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ data/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ features/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ evaluation/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ utils/
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ _quarto.yml
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.qmd
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ requirements.txt
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ LICENSE
в””в”Ђв”Ђ TODO.md
```

---

## Status

This project is currently under active development. Each component is being implemented and validated incrementally through the notebook pipeline.
